intro: this is a example game, in this game you must try and kill the goblin, and get the gem, you win when you drop the gem in the main foyer

rooms.name: The Grand Foyer
rooms.desc: You are standing in a massive circular hall. Passages lead in all four cardinal directions. A spiral staircase goes UP, and a dark trapdoor leads DOWN.

rooms.name: North Hall
rooms.desc: A cold northern hallway. The foyer is south.

rooms.name: South Garden
rooms.desc: A beautiful indoor garden. The foyer is north.

rooms.name: East Armory
rooms.desc: Racks of rusty weapons line the walls. The foyer is west.

rooms.name: West Library
rooms.desc: Bookshelves surround you. The foyer is east.

rooms.name: The Tower
rooms.desc: You are at the top of the stairs. The wind howls. The only way is down.

rooms.name: The Dungeon
rooms.desc: It is damp and terrifying down here. A ladder leads up.

items.name: POTION
items.desc: A glass flask filled with glowing red liquid.

actors.name: GOBLIN
actors.desc: A nasty, green-skinned goblin clutching a dagger.

actors.name: GUARD
actors.desc: A sleepy castle guard leaning against the wall.
